summary: Live Trading System testing completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend trading UI verified with demo mode trade execution working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/trading/portfolio - Returns portfolio summary with PnL
GET /api/trading/portfolio - Live vs Paper portfolio separation
GET /api/trading/supported-tokens - Returns BTC, ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT
End-to-end trading flow: register -> mode -> execute -> positions -> portfolio -> history
Frontend: Trading Mode Toggle (Simulation/Live) visible and clickable
Frontend: Execute buttons on BTC, ETH, SOL signal cards
Frontend: Trade modal opens with asset details, price, confidence
Frontend: Confirm Trade button executes paper trade
Frontend: Success toast shows executed price
critical_code_review_comments: Live trading system implementation is complete and well-structured
Paper trading uses simulated slippage (0.1-0.3%) and gas fees ($2-10)
Uniswap V3 integration prepared for live trading (testnet mode by default)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Registered demo_user wallet for demo mode testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live trading system fully functional. Paper trading works in demo mode. Test wallet 0xTestProUser123 has Pro status and existing positions. demo_user wallet registered for demo mode. Uniswap V3 live execution is MOCKED (returns prepared transaction for frontend signing).

mocked_apis_list: Live Uniswap V3 swaps - prepared transaction returned for frontend signing (not actually executed on-chain)
Paper trading - simulated execution with random slippage and gas fees

features_verified.trade_execution_api: ✅ POST /api/trading/execute - paper trades work, live returns prepared tx
features_verified.positions_api: ✅ GET /api/trading/positions - returns open positions with unrealized PnL
features_verified.portfolio_api: ✅ GET /api/trading/portfolio - returns summary with net PnL, win rate
features_verified.history_api: ✅ GET /api/trading/history - returns trade history with pagination
features_verified.supported_tokens_api: ✅ GET /api/trading/supported-tokens - BTC, ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT
features_verified.frontend_toggle: ✅ Trading Mode toggle (Simulation/Live) visible and functional
features_verified.frontend_execute_btns: ✅ Execute buttons on BUY/SELL signals (not HOLD)
features_verified.frontend_trade_modal: ✅ Modal with asset, price, signal, confidence, amount selection
features_verified.frontend_confirm_btn: ✅ Confirm Trade button executes paper trade successfully

test_wallet_info.demo_wallet: demo_user - Registered for demo mode, paper_balance $10000
